edge_hypothesis: The advisory discovered that Supertrend produces TWO viable strategies with OPPOSITE regime preferences: ADX>5 for ranging (PF=1.61, 99 trades, ACCEPT on 4h) and ADX>20 for trending (PF=1.42, 22 trades, REVISE on 4h — below 30-trade gate). This is the first evidence of regime-partitioned strategy design within a single template family. The trending variant (ADX>20+) only produced 22 trades on 4h because strong-trend + Supertrend flip events are rare on 4h bars. On 1h with ~6x more bars, trade count should reach 50-130 trades, clearing the 30-trade gate. The fundamental insight: Supertrend direction flip means different things at different ADX levels. At low ADX (ranging market), a Supertrend flip catches range reversals — mean reversion within a sideways channel. At high ADX (trending market), a Supertrend flip catches early trend entries or trend acceleration after a brief counter-trend pullback. These are structurally UNCORRELATED signals even though they use the same indicator. Testing three ADX tiers on 1h: ADX>25 (strong trend only), ADX>15 (moderate trend), ADX>5 (near-zero filter, ranging). All with extreme R:R following the proven tail harvesting principle. Regime: tier-dependent. Invalidation: if PF on 1h is materially worse than 4h for the same ADX setting, the 1h timeframe introduces too much noise for Supertrend — stick with 4h and accept low trade counts.

variants.name: supertrend_1h_strong_trend_7to1
variants.description: Supertrend direction flip with ADX>25 on ETH/1h with 7:1 R:R. The trending-regime specialist. On 4h, ADX>20 produced PF=1.42 with only 22 trades. ADX>25 is slightly more selective (strong trends only) but on 1h should still produce 40-80 trades. The Supertrend flip in a strong trend catches the moment when a brief counter-trend move ends and the dominant trend resumes — a high-conviction re-entry point. 7:1 R:R (2.0x stop, 14.0x TP) captures the subsequent trend leg. This is the COMPLEMENT to the ranging ADX>5 variant — together they provide full regime coverage.
entry_long: SUPERTd_7_3.0 flips from <= 0 to > 0 (Supertrend direction change to bullish).
ADX_14 > 25 (strong trend confirmed — not ranging or transitional).
entry_short: SUPERTd_7_3.0 flips from >= 0 to < 0 (Supertrend direction change to bearish).
filters: Backtester executable indicators: EMA, SMA, RSI, ATR, MACD, Bollinger Bands, Stochastic, ADX, CCI, Williams %R, OBV, VWAP, Ichimoku, Supertrend, Donchian Channels.
exit_rules: Exit on ATR-based take profit hit (14.0x ATR).
Exit on ATR-based stop loss hit (2.0x ATR).
Hypothesis failure mode: if trade count < 30 even on 1h, ADX>25 is too restrictive — reduce to ADX>20
risk_rules: Stop loss at 2.0x ATR_14 below/above entry.
Take profit at 14.0x ATR_14 from entry.

components.notes: SUPERTd_7_3.0 direction flip — primary signal, trend re-entry after brief counter-move
ADX_14 > 25 — strong trend filter, rejects ranging/transitional signals
ATR_14 for 2.0x stop / 14.0x TP — 7:1 R:R trending tail harvester

variants.name: supertrend_1h_ranging_harvest_6to1
variants.description: Supertrend direction flip with ADX>5 (near-zero filter) on ETH/1h with 6:1 R:R. The ranging-regime specialist. On 4h, ADX>5 produced PF=1.22 (ACCEPT) with 99 trades — the Supertrend flip at low ADX acts as a MEAN REVERSION signal, not trend-following. At ADX<15, Supertrend oscillates as price ranges, and the flip catches range extremes. On 1h, expect 200-400 trades, providing very strong statistical confidence. 6:1 R:R (proven for Supertrend on 4h ACCEPT). ADX>5 essentially removes the gate — the Supertrend flip alone IS the signal.
entry_long: SUPERTd_7_3.0 flips from <= 0 to > 0 (Supertrend direction change to bullish).
ADX_14 > 5 (minimal filter — allows ranging market entries).
entry_short: SUPERTd_7_3.0 flips from >= 0 to < 0 (Supertrend direction change to bearish).
filters: Backtester executable indicators: EMA, SMA, RSI, ATR, MACD, Bollinger Bands, Stochastic, ADX, CCI, Williams %R, OBV, VWAP, Ichimoku, Supertrend, Donchian Channels.
exit_rules: Exit on ATR-based take profit hit (12.0x ATR).
Exit on ATR-based stop loss hit (2.0x ATR).
Hypothesis failure mode: if PF on 1h < PF on 4h (1.22), the 1h noise degrades Supertrend flip quality at low ADX
risk_rules: Stop loss at 2.0x ATR_14 below/above entry.
Take profit at 12.0x ATR_14 from entry.

components.notes: SUPERTd_7_3.0 direction flip — acts as mean-reversion signal at low ADX
ADX_14 > 5 — near-zero gate, allows all regimes, Supertrend flip is the sole signal
ATR_14 for 2.0x stop / 12.0x TP — 6:1 R:R proven at ACCEPT level on 4h

variants.name: supertrend_1h_moderate_trend_8to1
variants.description: Supertrend direction flip with ADX>15 on ETH/1h with 8:1 R:R. The middle-ground variant between strong-trend (ADX>25) and ranging (ADX>5). ADX>15 captures moderate trends — not the strongest moves but also not choppy ranging action. This fills the gap between the two extreme ADX tiers. If PF is higher than both ADX>25 and ADX>5, it means the moderate-trend zone is Supertrend's actual sweet spot on 1h. 8:1 R:R (1.5x stop, 12.0x TP) provides the most aggressive stop floor allowed while capturing deep tails.
entry_long: SUPERTd_7_3.0 flips from <= 0 to > 0 (Supertrend direction change to bullish).
ADX_14 > 15 (moderate trend filter — rejects only choppy low-trend markets).
entry_short: SUPERTd_7_3.0 flips from >= 0 to < 0 (Supertrend direction change to bearish).
filters: Backtester executable indicators: EMA, SMA, RSI, ATR, MACD, Bollinger Bands, Stochastic, ADX, CCI, Williams %R, OBV, VWAP, Ichimoku, Supertrend, Donchian Channels.
exit_rules: Exit on ATR-based take profit hit (12.0x ATR).
Exit on ATR-based stop loss hit (1.5x ATR).
Hypothesis failure mode: if PF < both ADX>25 and ADX>5 variants, the moderate-trend zone is Supertrend's worst regime on 1h
risk_rules: Stop loss at 1.5x ATR_14 below/above entry.
Take profit at 12.0x ATR_14 from entry.

components.notes: SUPERTd_7_3.0 direction flip — signal quality varies by ADX regime
ADX_14 > 15 — moderate trend filter, testing the middle ground between ADX>5 and ADX>25
ATR_14 for 1.5x stop / 12.0x TP — 8:1 R:R with minimum stop floor
